title: Implement a paving project
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement a paving project demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for paving project

pcs.text: Interpret site plans and specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret site plans and specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret site plans and specifications.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select tools, equipment and machinery required to implement a paving project and check for safe operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select tools, equipment and machinery required to implement a paving project and check for safe operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tools, equipment and machinery required to implement a paving project and check for safe operation.

pcs.text: Identify and ameliorate environmental impacts of proposed works
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and ameliorate environmental impacts of proposed works?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and ameliorate environmental impacts of proposed works.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Organise delivery of materials to site according to workplace priorities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Organise delivery of materials to site according to workplace priorities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Organise delivery of materials to site according to workplace priorities.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for paving project

elements.title: Set out and prepare the site

pcs.text: Erect site bunting, control pedestrian access and place safety signage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Erect site bunting, control pedestrian access and place safety signage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Erect site bunting, control pedestrian access and place safety signage.

pcs.text: Determine, locate and mark out services from site plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine, locate and mark out services from site plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine, locate and mark out services from site plan.

pcs.text: Make provision for irrigation lines to cross paved areas
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make provision for irrigation lines to cross paved areas?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make provision for irrigation lines to cross paved areas.

pcs.text: Mark out paving pattern according to plans and specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Mark out paving pattern according to plans and specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Mark out paving pattern according to plans and specifications.

pcs.text: Place and compact sub-base material to required finished levels
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place and compact sub-base material to required finished levels?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place and compact sub-base material to required finished levels.

pcs.text: Incorporate surface drainage as specified
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Incorporate surface drainage as specified?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Incorporate surface drainage as specified.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Set out and prepare the site

elements.title: Implement paving project

pcs.text: Construct paving according to plans and specification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Construct paving according to plans and specification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Construct paving according to plans and specification.

pcs.text: Install appropriate drainage as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install appropriate drainage as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install appropriate drainage as required.

pcs.text: Use tools, equipment and machinery safety in accordance with workplace safe operating procedures and workplace health and safety requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use tools, equipment and machinery safety in accordance with workplace safe operating procedures and workplace health and safety requirements.

elements.title: Install stone paving

pcs.text: Set out and prepare area to be paved according to site plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set out and prepare area to be paved according to site plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set out and prepare area to be paved according to site plan.

pcs.text: Excavate area to shape, depth and dimensions to sub-base level
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Excavate area to shape, depth and dimensions to sub-base level?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Excavate area to shape, depth and dimensions to sub-base level.

pcs.text: Trim the sub-base to designated level and falls and place and compact base material to finished level
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Trim the sub-base to designated level and falls and place and compact base material to finished level?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Trim the sub-base to designated level and falls and place and compact base material to finished level.

pcs.text: Spread bedding material over area and level to designated level and falls

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Spread bedding material over area and level to designated level and falls.

pcs.text: Treat, place and fit stone accurately and fill gaps in the pattern within tolerances nominated in site plan and specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Treat, place and fit stone accurately and fill gaps in the pattern within tolerances nominated in site plan and specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Treat, place and fit stone accurately and fill gaps in the pattern within tolerances nominated in site plan and specifications.

pcs.text: Install edge constraints as required by site plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Install edge constraints as required by site plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Install edge constraints as required by site plan.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect quality of finished works to ensure standard of finished paving project is in accordance with design drawings and specifications.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean work-site and dispose of or recycle waste material from site.

pcs.text: Clean, maintain and store tools, equipment and machinery

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, maintain and store tools, equipment and machinery.

pcs.text: Identify and report unserviceable tools, equipment and machinery according to workplace procedures
